breakdown: This PR stabilizes level-up regressions by replacing the custom `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function with the canonical `extract_character_xp` helper, and switching from `check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl` to `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending`. The XP synthesis in rewards boxes was also enhanced to check `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries before falling back to pending rewards. Test coverage is excellent with comprehensive tests for XP extraction scenarios.
key_changes: Add `xp_awarded` extraction from encounter_summary in rewards synthesis
Remove the redundant `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function after consolidation
